title: Advanced Combat (Revitalized)
description: A modern recreation of Advanced Combat from scratch, for Forge, Fabric and Quilt
body:
NOW SUPPORTING NEOFORGE, FORGE AND FABRIC

 

Supported Versions: Most Popular Modding Versions

 

Discord: StyStatic's Gaming Gamers

 

A modern recreation of Advanced Combat from scratch

 

This mod adds exceptionally strong swords along with a new way to enchant your items. From the weak Advanced Wooden Sword to the All-Powerful Advanced Nether Star Sword, this mod is guaranteed to satisfy your cravings.

 

It also includes enchantment upgrades, that allow you to pick your enchantments for your tools and armor rather than taking your chances at the enchanting table.

 

The enchantment upgrades also have a second tier, that lets you go up to double the vanilla level!

 

Other Features:

  • the Advanced Bow, which always crits, has more durability, and does extra damage!
  • the Advanced Shield, which has more durability than a normal shield, allowing for prolonged fights
  • Oak Wood, Stone, Nether Fortress, and Obsidian armors that all have special strengths and weaknesses

 

 

Images and Videos

A few of the items in the mod

The Creative Tab

 

 

 

I recommend JEI or an Equivalent for the recipes

 

Thank you to anyone who enjoys this mod!
